title: JNCASR Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate Posts
description: The Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) has officially released the notification to fill the 01 Research Associate Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M. Pharm, M.E./M. Tech, MDS, MD/MS, and Ph.D. can apply for the JNCASR Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details...
